name: consolidate-search-command
goal: Create a single `arete search` command that provides global semantic search across the workspace, replacing the fragmented `context --for`, `memory search`, and `memory timeline` commands.

userStories.title: Document output schemas and test matrix
userStories.description: Define the 3 output schemas (default, timeline, answer) in code comments. Create test coverage matrix covering all flag combinations. Define scope-to-collection mapping constant.
acceptanceCriteria: Output schemas documented in task or code
Test matrix covers all scopes (memory|meetings|context|projects|people|all)
Test matrix covers person filtering (resolved, ambiguous, not-found)
Test matrix covers timeline with/without --days
Test matrix covers --answer (configured, not configured, error)
Test matrix covers flag combinations (--scope memory --timeline, etc.)
Scope-to-collection mapping defined as constant

userStories.title: Update qmd-setup.ts for multi-collection
userStories.description: Modify `ensureQmdCollection()` to create 6 scope-based collections during install. Update `refreshQmdIndex()` to update all collections. Store collection names in `arete.yaml` under `qmd_collections`.
acceptanceCriteria: `arete install` creates 6 QMD collections (all, memory, meetings, context, projects, people)
`arete update` maintains all collections
Collection names stored in `arete.yaml` under `qmd_collections`
`qmd status` shows all collections when run in workspace

userStories.title: Config migration for backward compatibility
userStories.description: Support both `qmd_collection` (old) and `qmd_collections` (new) in `loadConfig()`. If old format exists, treat as `all` collection only for seamless migration.
acceptanceCriteria: Old `qmd_collection` config still works (treated as `all` collection)
New `qmd_collections` config works with all 6 collections
Migration path is seamless (no user action required for existing workspaces)

userStories.title: Create search.ts with core functionality
userStories.description: Create `packages/cli/src/commands/search.ts` with core search functionality. Implement `--scope` flag with `-c collection` pass-through to QMD. Implement `--limit` flag. Implement `--json` output with documented schema. Wire into CLI index.
acceptanceCriteria: `arete search "query"` returns results from all collections
`--scope memory` uses `-c` flag to search memory collection only
`--scope meetings` uses `-c` flag to search meetings collection only
`--scope context` uses `-c` flag to search context collection only
`--scope projects` uses `-c` flag to search projects collection only
`--scope people` uses `-c` flag to search people collection only
`--limit 5` returns only 5 results
`--json` outputs documented default schema

userStories.title: Add person filtering to search command
userStories.description: Implement `--person <name>` filter via EntityService.resolve(). Handle ambiguous matches (warn + show options). Handle not found (error message).
acceptanceCriteria: `--person "jane"` resolves and filters results by person
`--person "ambiguous"` shows clear error with resolution options
`--person "unknown"` shows not found error message

userStories.title: Implement timeline mode
userStories.description: Add `--timeline` flag to search command. Add `--days N` filter for date range. Reuse `MemoryService.getTimeline()` for theme extraction. Output chronological results with dates and recurring themes. Use timeline output schema in JSON mode.
acceptanceCriteria: `--timeline` shows results chronologically with dates
`--days 30` limits results to last 30 days
Recurring themes extracted and displayed
Works with `--scope` flag (e.g. `--scope memory --timeline`)
Works with `--json` flag
JSON output uses documented timeline schema

userStories.title: Implement --answer flag with intent derivation
userStories.description: Add `--answer` flag for AI synthesis. Check `services.ai.isConfigured()`. Implement `deriveIntent()` function from query patterns. Pass `--intent` to QMD CLI call when intent derived. Pass results + question to AIService for synthesis. Return both results and synthesized answer using answer schema.
acceptanceCriteria: `--answer` synthesizes response when AI configured
`--answer` warns gracefully when AI not configured (still shows results)
Intent derived from query patterns (what did we decide, who should I talk to, why did we, when did we, what is)
Intent passed to QMD via `--intent` flag when derived
JSON output includes both `results` and `answer` fields
AI errors handled gracefully (show results, warn about synthesis failure)

userStories.title: Update foundation files (PATTERNS.md and authoring guide)
userStories.description: Update `PATTERNS.md` â€” `context_bundle_assembly` pattern to use new search command. Update `_authoring-guide.md`. Ensure consistency between files. These are foundation files that 11 skills inherit from.
acceptanceCriteria: PATTERNS.md updated (context_bundle_assembly pattern uses search command)
_authoring-guide.md updated with new search command references
Pattern and guide are consistent with each other

userStories.title: Update week-review skill
userStories.description: Read full skill, understand purpose. Update to appropriate `search` command usage.
acceptanceCriteria: week-review/SKILL.md uses new search command
Functionality preserved (skill still works as intended)

userStories.title: Update process-meetings skill
userStories.description: Read full skill, understand purpose. Update to appropriate `search` command usage.
acceptanceCriteria: process-meetings/SKILL.md uses new search command
Functionality preserved (skill still works as intended)

userStories.title: Update documentation files
userStories.description: Update informational references in documentation files: `capture-conversation/SKILL.md`, `_integration-guide.md`, `README.md`.
acceptanceCriteria: capture-conversation/SKILL.md updated with new search command references
_integration-guide.md updated with new search command references
README.md updated with new search command references
No stale command references remain in these files

userStories.title: Update rules files
userStories.description: Update `pm-workspace.mdc` rules files for both cursor and claude-code versions. Keep them in sync.
acceptanceCriteria: pm-workspace.mdc (cursor version) updated
pm-workspace.mdc (claude-code version) updated
Both rule files are in sync
No deprecated command references remain

userStories.title: Verify skill migration complete
userStories.description: Run grep to verify no remaining references to deprecated commands in packages/runtime. Fix any stragglers before proceeding to deprecation phase.
acceptanceCriteria: `grep -r "context --for\|memory search\|memory timeline" packages/runtime` returns 0 results
All skills and rules updated consistently

userStories.title: Add deprecation warnings to deprecated commands
userStories.description: Add deprecation warning to `context --for`, `memory search`, and `memory timeline` commands (STDERR). Add `deprecated: true` field to JSON output. Include migration guidance in warning message.
acceptanceCriteria: `context --for` shows deprecation warning on STDERR
`memory search` shows deprecation warning on STDERR
`memory timeline` shows deprecation warning on STDERR
JSON output includes `deprecated: true` field
Warnings include specific migration command (e.g. 'Use `arete search` instead')

userStories.title: Update AGENTS.md sources and regenerate
userStories.description: Update `.agents/sources/shared/cli-commands.md` with new search commands. Mark deprecated commands in documentation. Update tool_selection heuristics to point to search. Run `npm run build:agents` to regenerate AGENTS.md.
acceptanceCriteria: cli-commands.md includes all search command variants
tool_selection heuristics guide agents to use `search` command
Deprecated commands documented with migration path
AGENTS.md regenerated with `npm run build:agents`

userStories.title: Update GUIDE.md
userStories.description: Add `search` command documentation to GUIDE.md. Document all flags and use cases.
acceptanceCriteria: GUIDE.md includes search command documentation
All flags documented (--scope, --timeline, --days, --person, --answer, --limit, --json)
Use cases and examples provided
